evals.name: design-invoice-extraction-schema
evals.prompt: hey can you help me design a baml schema for extracting data from invoices? I need to pull out like vendor info, line items with prices and quantities, tax amounts, and total. also sometimes invoices have multiple currencies so need to handle that
evals.expected_output: Complete BAML schema with Invoice, LineItem, Vendor classes following naming conventions (PascalCase classes, snake_case fields), proper @description annotations, appropriate types (optional for vendor_email, arrays for line_items), and test cases covering basic invoices, multi-currency, and edge cases

evals.name: review-existing-baml-code
evals.expected_output: Detailed review identifying: (1) class should be PascalCase (UserProfile not user_profile), (2) fields should be snake_case (user_name, email, phone_number), (3) missing @description on all fields, (4) prompt missing ctx.output_format, (5) test needs descriptive name, (6) should mark optional fields with ?, (7) should add more test cases for edge cases. Provide corrected version with explanations

evals.name: generate-comprehensive-tests
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive test suite with 8-10 tests covering: (1) basic classifications (feature, bugfix, refactor, docs, test), (2) edge cases (empty message, very long message, ambiguous), (3) complex scenarios (mixed changes, breaking changes, reverts), (4) all tests with descriptive names like classify_feature_with_new_files, classify_bugfix_with_test, classify_ambiguous_refactor, using realistic commit messages and diff summaries
